thesis: Classic VCP with 3 tightening contractions (score 77), all 8 Minervini criteria passed, strong RS (65.98), and fundamentals support (B grade, 57% EPS growth). Near pivot at 136.53 provides support. Tight last contraction (12.73%) with volume ratio 0.854 suggests coiled setup.

VCP score 74 with 2 contractions, all 8 criteria met, exceptional RS (98/100), strong EPS growth (81%), margins expanding. Volume drying is a mild concern, but recent breakout momentum from 04-24 (418.08 high) combined with 323.36 pivot support structure suggests reversal opportunity. Volatility not contracting but tightening phase visible.

Perfect RS (100/100), massive 1356% YoY return, but VCP score only 62 with 4 contractions (longer series = less reliable pattern). Volume ratio 1.432 is elevated (concerning). Margins expanded dramatically but from negative baseline; EPS 999% growth is likely a loss-to-profit swing, not organic growth. Last contraction 8.17% is tight, but stock rallied 19% in last 4 days after 04-24 high—may be overextended. Hold for retest of pivot at 897.3 or deeper pullback.

VCP score 82 with 3 tight contractions (11.72% final), all 8 criteria passed, RS 95, strong profitability (35.7% margin, 100.7 ROE). Price at all-time high but within 1.81% pullback. Pivot 1566.19 well below, volume not drying. B-grade fundamentals with 40.9% EPS growth and margin expansion support continuation.

A-grade fundamental (40 score), 1816% EPS growth (profit turnaround), 50.8% net margin, RS 96/100. VCP score 59 (weaker) with 3 contractions, not tightening trend visible, but price is only 2.55% below 52-week high with pivot 923.69 below. All 8 criteria met. Recent ramp 04-22 to high validates momentum; pullback minimal suggests strength.

A-grade fundamental (41 score), 156.9% EPS growth, 56.5% revenue growth, expanding margins, RS 98/100, all 8 criteria passed. Price at all-time high (0% from high), VCP score 51 is moderate with 2 contractions but not tightening. Pivot at 1470.64 offers solid support. Small target reflects valuation risk near all-time high, but strong earnings momentum justifies continuation play.

All 8 criteria met, RS 92/100, VCP score 64 with 3 tightening contractions (last 12.04% tightening trend = true). At all-time high (0% drawdown), B-grade fundamentals (36 score) with 31.2% EPS growth, margins expanding, 35.7 ROE. Volume drying is yellow flag. Price at peak, limited upside near-term, but technical setup clean. Conservative entry at pullback preferred.

All 8 criteria met, RS 97/100, B-grade fundamentals (38 score), 40.8% EPS growth, 31.2% net margin. VCP score 54 with 3 contractions, last 16.29% depth shows tightening. Volume ratio 0.827 healthy. Price 4.75% below 52-week high; pivot 238.84 is solid support. Recent breakout from 04-09 (258.76) to 04-14 high (272.41) confirmed pattern, pullback to 259.47 offers continuation entry.
